canonical_truth.summary: YY overslept and woke up after breakfast had ended.

perception_prompt.noticeable_surface: YY wakes up. Something feels off. The light is wrong. The sounds are wrong. It is too quiet for this hour.

authorial_note.real_world_inspiration: World Quantum Day — Google Doodle, April 14 2026
authorial_note.translation_logic: Quantum Day suggested time as a theme. Oversleeping is a small, personal time slip — time moved without YY. Chosen as a minimal perturbation appropriate for Day 1.
authorial_note.restraint_reason: Day 1 of the root — kept the shift small deliberately. The theme is there but not overplayed.
